channel.title: Android on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Android on Arrans github.io

item.title: waydroid/waydroid
item.description: Waydroid uses a container-based approach to boot a full Android system on a regular GNU/Linux system like Ubuntu.

item.title: k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx
item.description: Speech-to-text, text-to-speech, and speaker recognition using next-gen Kaldi with onnxruntime without Internet connection. Support embedded systems, Android, iOS, Raspberry Pi, RISC-V, x86_64 servers, websocket server/client, C/C++, Python, Kotlin, C#, Go, NodeJS, Java, Swift, Dart, JavaScript, Flutter

item.title: ente-io/ente
item.description: Fully open source, End to End Encrypted alternative to Google Photos and Apple Photos

item.title: NativeScript/NativeScript
item.description: ⚡ Empowering JavaScript with native platform APIs. ✨ Best of all worlds (TypeScript, Swift, Objective C, Kotlin, Java, Dart). Use what you love ❤️ Angular, Capacitor, Ionic, React, Solid, Svelte, Vue with: iOS (UIKit, SwiftUI), Android (View, Jetpack Compose), Dart (Flutter) and you name it compatible.

item.title: google/material-design-icons
item.description: Material Design icons by Google (Material Symbols)

item.title: Solido/awesome-flutter
item.description: An awesome list that curates the best Flutter libraries, tools, tutorials, articles and more.

item.title: tldr-pages/tldr
item.description: 📚 Collaborative cheatsheets for console commands

item.title: appwrite/appwrite
item.description: Your backend, minus the hassle.

item.title: termux/termux-app
item.description: Termux - a terminal emulator application for Android OS extendible by variety of packages.

item.title: laurent22/joplin
item.description: Joplin - the secure note taking and to-do app with synchronisation capabilities for Windows, macOS, Linux, Android and iOS.

item.title: ReVanced/revanced-manager
item.description: 💊 Application to use ReVanced on Android

item.title: isar/isar
item.description: Extremely fast, easy to use, and fully async NoSQL database for Flutter

item.title: KRTirtho/spotube
item.description: 🎧 Open source Spotify client that doesn’t require Premium nor uses Electron! Available for both desktop & mobile!

item.title: dotnet/maui
item.description: .NET MAUI is the .NET Multi-platform App UI, a framework for building native device applications spanning mobile, tablet, and desktop.

item.title: codepath/android_guides
item.description: Extensive Open-Source Guides for Android Developers

item.title: fyne-io/fyne
item.description: Cross platform GUI toolkit in Go inspired by Material Design

item.title: wasabeef/awesome-android-ui
item.description: A curated list of awesome Android UI/UX libraries

item.title: caydey/ffshare
item.description: An android app to compress image, video and audio files through ffmpeg before sharing them

item.title: M66B/FairEmail
item.description: Fully featured, open source, privacy friendly email app for Android

item.title: thunder-app/thunder
item.description: Thunder - An open-source cross-platform Lemmy client for iOS and Android built with Flutter

item.title: beemdevelopment/Aegis
item.description: A free, secure and open source app for Android to manage your 2-step verification tokens.

item.title: sk22/megalodon
item.description: Pink modification of the official Mastodon for Android app

item.title: BlinkID/blinkid-android
item.description: Everything you need to add AI-driven ID scanning into your native Android app.

item.title: flyerhq/flutter_chat_ui
item.description: Actively maintained, community-driven chat UI implementation with an optional Firebase BaaS.

item.title: Shabinder/SpotiFlyer
item.description: Kotlin Multiplatform Music Downloader, Supports Spotify / Gaana / Youtube Music / Jio Saavn / SoundCloud.

item.title: mobile-dev-inc/maestro
item.description: Painless Mobile UI Automation

item.title: Mobile-Artificial-Intelligence/maid
item.description: Maid is a cross-platform Flutter app for interfacing with GGUF / llama.cpp models locally, and with Ollama and OpenAI models remotely.

item.title: therecipe/qt
item.description: Qt binding for Go (Golang) with support for Windows / macOS / Linux / FreeBSD / Android / iOS / Sailfish OS / Raspberry Pi / AsteroidOS / Ubuntu Touch / JavaScript / WebAssembly

item.title: deltachat/deltachat-android
item.description: Email-based instant messaging for Android.

item.title: android-password-store/Android-Password-Store
item.description: Android application compatible with ZX2C4’s Pass command line application

item.title: SimformSolutionsPvtLtd/flutter_chatview
item.description: Highly customisable chat UI with reply and reaction functionality.

item.title: media-kit/media-kit
item.description: A cross-platform video player & audio player for Flutter & Dart.

item.title: objectbox/objectbox-dart
item.description: Flutter database for super-fast Dart object persistence

item.title: ubuntu-flutter-community/musicpod
item.description: Music, radio, television and podcast player for Ubuntu, Windows, MacOs and Android

item.title: dessalines/thumb-key
item.description: A privacy-conscious Android keyboard made for your thumbs

item.title: OrangeDrangon/android-messages-desktop
item.description: Android Messages as a Cross-platform Desktop App

item.title: authpass/authpass
item.description: AuthPass - Password Manager based on Flutter for all platforms. Keepass 2.x (kdbx 3.x) compatible.

item.title: vcmi/vcmi
item.description: Open-source engine for Heroes of Might and Magic III

item.title: X1nto/Mauth
item.description: A Material You Two-factor Authentication app

item.title: cogentcore/core
item.description: A free and open source framework for building powerful, fast, and elegant 2D and 3D apps that run on macOS, Windows, Linux, iOS, Android, and the Web with a single pure Go codebase, allowing you to Code Once, Run Everywhere.

item.title: LemmyNet/jerboa
item.description: A native android app for Lemmy

item.title: oi-narendra/multiselect-dropdown
item.description: Streamlined Flutter widget for versatile multi-selection with extensive customization.

item.title: uTox/uTox
item.description: µTox the lightest and fluffiest Tox client

item.title: afonsocraposo/buttons_tabbar
item.description: A Flutter package that implements a TabBar where each label is a toggle button.

item.title: azkadev/whisper
item.description: Whisper Dart is a cross platform library for dart and flutter that allows converting audio to text / speech to text / inference from Open AI models

item.title: SebastienBtr/Dash-Chat-2
item.description: The most complete Chat UI for flutter. Easy to use, highly customizable and fully featured

item.title: GloDroid/glodroid_manifest
item.description: Android port that aims to bring both user- and developer-friendly experience in using AOSP with a set of single-board computers (SBC), phones and other devices.

item.title: ligi/SurvivalManual
item.description: Libre Survival Manual for Android with offline in mind

item.title: jberkel/sms-backup-plus
item.description: Backup Android SMS, MMS and call log to Gmail / Gcal / IMAP

item.title: Lallassu/bintris
item.description: Binary Tetris

item.title: keshav-space/safenotes
item.description: Safe Notes is a security project aimed at providing an encrypted, private note manager that works locally and protects notes from various threat actors.

item.title: googleworkspace/android-samples
item.description: Android samples for Google Workspace APIs

item.title: nebomuk/nobleNoteAndroid
item.description: Simple Android app to make and manage notes
